google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite.description: Recommended. Speed Champion (~1-2s latency). Flawless rules compliance and sub-second responses. Outstanding resource conservation, combo awareness and teammate feeding.

deepseek/deepseek-chat.description: Strategic master (~2-3s latency). Unparalleled strategic depth, superior teammate communication and trump unification.

qwen/qwen3-next-80b-a3b-instruct.description: Elite tactical engine (~3-4s latency). Flawless rules compliance, superb combo recognition, and great point preservation.

meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct.description: Value King (~2-3s latency). Excellent instructions follower and reliable rules alignment.
